name: node-minipass
title: node-minipass
summary: Minimal implementation of a PassThrough for Node.js
description:
Minimal implementation of a PassThrough for Node.js
minipass supports pipe/multi-pipe buffering data until either a "data"
event handler or "pipe()" is added (so firsk chunk not loose).
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use node-minipass because Minimal implementation of a PassThrough for Node.js.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use node-minipass as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair node-minipass with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `node-minipass --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
